seo.title: Fiberglass Pool Quality | Maxima Pools - Columbus, OH
seo.description: Learn what sets our fiberglass pool quality apart. Premium hand-laid construction, marine-grade Vinyl Ester resin, and expert craftsmanship that ensure lasting strength and durability.
seo.ogDescription: Discover the premium materials and expert hand-laid construction that make San Juan the highest quality fiberglass pool in the world.

hero.subtitle: What separates a standard swimming pool from one that truly lasts a lifetime? It starts with design precision, the choice of materials, and the craftsmanship behind every layer.

highestQuality.paragraph1: All fiberglass is hand-laid using only solid sheets. We do not use chop fiberglass — a common practice that involves gluing shards of fiberglass to create layers. These are not solid layers and create weaker walls at a reduced price.
highestQuality.paragraph2: At San Juan Pools, we do not compromise price for quality. We invest in people who construct every pool from scratch — talented tradesmen with decades of experience who know our products best.
highestQuality.imageAlt: San Juan fiberglass pool — highest quality construction

comparison.paragraph: Not all fiberglass is created equal. The construction method defines the strength, durability, and lifespan of your pool. Here's how San Juan compares.

layersSection.intro: Click each layer to understand how every component contributes to unmatched strength and longevity.

materialsSection.intro: Each component plays a vital role in maintaining exceptional quality and long-term performance.

materialCards.title: Premium Fiberglass Layers
materialCards.description: At the heart of every pool is a carefully engineered shell made with hand-laid fiberglass layers. Unlike sprayed or chopped fiberglass, this process guarantees even thickness, consistent strength, and superior flexibility — the same standards used in marine and aerospace applications.

materialCards.title: Advanced Gelcoat Protection
materialCards.description: An advanced gelcoat surface finish that provides a smooth, non-porous barrier resisting staining, algae growth, and chemical damage. This coating delivers aesthetic brilliance while preserving quality against everyday wear, UV rays, and environmental stress.

materialCards.title: Reinforced Structural Design
materialCards.description: Multiple reinforcement layers using woven roving and Vinyl Ester resin — the same materials found in boat hulls. This combination prevents cracking, blistering, and delamination, even under extreme weather conditions.

benefitsSection.paragraph: Investing in superior quality pays off in countless ways — from long-term reliability to a flawless finish that never fades.

benefits.title: Durability & Longevity
benefits.description: A high-quality fiberglass shell won't crack, chip, or degrade over time. It maintains its structure and surface integrity for decades, giving you confidence your investment will stand strong.

benefits.title: Resistant to Fading & Cracking
benefits.description: Proprietary gelcoat finish and reinforced materials protect against common issues affecting lower-quality models. Less repair, less worry, more time enjoying your pool.

benefits.title: Low Maintenance
benefits.description: A smooth, non-porous surface means fewer chemicals, less cleaning, and no resurfacing. High quality translates into less effort and lower lifetime costs — water stays cleaner, longer.

compareCards.title: How It's Made
compareCards.description: See the 7-step hand-laid manufacturing process behind every San Juan pool.

compareCards.title: San Juan VS Competitors
compareCards.description: Side-by-side comparison of construction methods, materials, and warranties.

compareCards.title: Fiberglass Pool Colors
compareCards.description: Explore the full range of gelcoat and Iridium finish color options.

finalCta.paragraph: Talk to our team today and get a personalized quote for a San Juan fiberglass pool built to outlast everything else.
